name: Clockwerk
description: I've a mind like a steel trap, and the physique to go with it! Rattletrap, the Clockwerk Rattletrap descends from the same far-flung kindred as Sniper and Tinker, and like many of the Keen Folk, has offset his diminutive stature through the application of gadgetry and wit.

abilities.name: Armor Power
abilities.description: Consumes a Chain Mail in Clockwerk's inventory and grants himself armor bonus. Grants bonus flat-percentage outgoing damage amplification per armor.

abilities.name: Battery Assault
abilities.description: Discharges high-powered shrapnel toward one random nearby enemy unit at a time, dealing damage and stunning the affected enemy unit.

abilities.name: Power Cogs
abilities.description: While Overclocking, the entire Power Cogs forms a greater aura radius, and grants Clockwerk armor bonus within proximity of any Power Cog.

abilities.name: Rocket Flare
abilities.description: While Overclocking, Clockwerk launches multiple rockets upon cast with increased damage and movement speed slow duration. This additionally increases the granted flying vision upon impact.

abilities.name: Overclocking
abilities.description: Applies a self-debuff that allows Clockwerk to increase the power of all his abilities' values. Applies a movement speed and attack speed slow once the duration runs out. While Overclocking, Jetpack grants additional movement speed and turn rate.

abilities.name: Jetpack
abilities.description: Grants unobstructed movement, flying vision, and bonus movement speed. However, this self-disarms and severely limits his turn rate. While Overclocking, Jetpack grants additional movement speed and turn rate.

abilities.name: Hookshot
abilities.description: Fires a rapid grappling device at the point-targeted location. If it latches on a unit, Clockwerk launches himself toward the unit, stunning and dealing damage.
